diplomaticOverture.name: Diplomatic Overture
diplomaticOverture.description: A rival bloc proposes a materials deal.
diplomaticOverture.flavourText: An offer has arrived through back channels.

signalInterference.name: Signal Interference
signalInterference.description: Atmospheric disturbances are corrupting signal readings.
signalInterference.flavourText: The transmission is becoming harder to distinguish from noise.

signalBreakthrough.name: Signal Breakthrough
signalBreakthrough.description: Analysts have isolated a coherent pattern in the transmission.
signalBreakthrough.flavourText: The mathematics underlying the signal have become unmistakable.

politicalScandalMinor.name: Procurement Scandal
politicalScandalMinor.description: Allegations of improper contracting processes emerge in the press.
politicalScandalMinor.flavourText: Every programme has its critics. This one has found its moment.

industrialAccident.name: Facility Incident
industrialAccident.description: A containment failure at an industrial site threatens operations.
industrialAccident.flavourText: The evacuation order came too late for some.

coastalFlooding.name: Coastal Inundation Event
coastalFlooding.description: Rising sea levels inundate coastal infrastructure.
coastalFlooding.flavourText: The tide that does not recede.

drought.name: Prolonged Drought
drought.description: Sustained heat and water shortages devastate forested and agricultural regions.
drought.flavourText: The ground cracks. What once grew here will not grow again.

industrialContamination.name: Industrial Contamination
industrialContamination.description: A toxic spill renders an industrial zone unusable for the foreseeable future.
industrialContamination.flavourText: The cleanup will outlast the careers of everyone responsible.

scientificLeap.name: Unexpected Breakthrough
scientificLeap.description: A serendipitous discovery yields cross-field insights.
scientificLeap.flavourText: Science rewards the prepared mind — and occasionally the lucky one.

blockadeGeopolitical.name: Supply Blockade
blockadeGeopolitical.description: A rival bloc restricts material transit through contested territory.
blockadeGeopolitical.flavourText: Cooperation is preferable. But cooperation requires leverage.

deepSpaceAnomaly.name: Deep Space Anomaly
deepSpaceAnomaly.description: Sensors detect an unexplained energy signature beyond the heliopause.
deepSpaceAnomaly.flavourText: The universe is not silent. It is waiting.

orbitalStationEngineeringChallenge.name: Habitation Ring: Supply Crisis
orbitalStationEngineeringChallenge.description: A critical components shipment for the Habitation Ring assembly has been delayed — junction seals for the pressurisation system are missing from the manifest.
orbitalStationEngineeringChallenge.flavourText: "We cannot proceed with the joining manoeuvre until the seals arrive. We need either a resupply launch or an engineering workaround."

boardProposalOrbitalStation.name: Board Proposal: Orbital Station
boardProposalOrbitalStation.description: The Chief Scientist formally proposes that the Corporation initiate the Permanent Orbital Station programme.
boardProposalOrbitalStation.flavourText: "We have the science. What we need now is the political will and the materials to make it real."

supplyChainDisruption.name: Supply Chain Disruption
supplyChainDisruption.description: A cascade of delays and shortages has brought critical material transit to a standstill.
supplyChainDisruption.flavourText: The ships are waiting. The trucks are waiting. Somewhere, a spreadsheet is to blame.

cyberIntrusion.name: Cyber Intrusion
cyberIntrusion.description: Hostile actors have infiltrated programme systems, exfiltrating research data and disrupting operations.
cyberIntrusion.flavourText: The breach was silent. The damage was not.

bloc_materials_eastAsia.name: East Asian Materials Exchange
bloc_materials_eastAsia.description: The East Asian Consortium is offering a materials transfer agreement. Accepting commits diplomatic resources, but the materials benefit is real.
bloc_materials_eastAsia.flavourText: The offer arrives through official channels. It is genuine.

bloc_materials_northAmerica.name: North American Surplus Offer
bloc_materials_northAmerica.description: The North American Space Administration has flagged a materials and funding surplus available for allied programmes.
bloc_materials_northAmerica.flavourText: Cooperation, they note, is more efficient than competition.

bloc_research_eurozone.name: European Research Partnership
bloc_research_eurozone.description: The European Community proposes a joint research initiative, sharing theoretical advances in physics and mathematics.
bloc_research_eurozone.flavourText: Science, they have always maintained, belongs to no single nation.

bloc_research_southAmerica.name: South American Biochemistry Exchange
bloc_research_southAmerica.description: The South American Union is offering access to biochemistry research developed through their ecological monitoring programmes.
bloc_research_southAmerica.flavourText: Decades of environmental data, finally made available.

bloc_pressure_middleEast.name: Gulf Consortium Funding Pressure
bloc_pressure_middleEast.description: The Gulf Consortium is lobbying donor governments to redirect funding away from your programme, citing energy security concerns.
bloc_pressure_middleEast.flavourText: They have not yet acted. But the pressure is real.

bloc_pressure_middleEast_2.name: Petro-State Political Interference
bloc_pressure_middleEast_2.description: Gulf Consortium representatives have lobbied key political partners, undermining support for the programme in several allied capitals.
bloc_pressure_middleEast_2.flavourText: Some interference cannot be countered. It can only be absorbed.

bloc_achievement.name: Rival Bloc Reaches Milestone
bloc_achievement.description: A rival programme has announced a significant advancement, drawing public attention and political commentary about your own pace of progress.
bloc_achievement.flavourText: The ticker runs. Your name is not at the top.

blocElimination.name: Bloc Collapse: Orphaned Infrastructure
blocElimination.description: A collapsing bloc's infrastructure stands unmaintained. You may commit resources to secure it before it deteriorates beyond use.
blocElimination.flavourText: The lights are still on. For now.
